data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to decrease decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined interface with minimal options per screen.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interface elements for ease of click and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons and icons.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Ensure visually appealing interface to enhance user satisfaction.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design expectations based on users’ prior digital experiences.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to common UI patterns for consistent user experience.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focuses on moments that form peak experiences for users.
